steps.title: Focus on service lengths
steps.content: The student wants to compare how long Clara Mae Porter and Nora Ellis worked as lighthouse keepers. The relevant notes give two durations: Porter served for twenty-two years, and Ellis served for fifty-four years.

steps.title: Reject unrelated lighthouse facts
steps.content: Choice A only says both were lighthouse keepers. Choice B gives a date range for Porter but incorrectly connects Ellis to Maryland, and Choice C includes only Porter's duration. The effective response must include both durations and make the longer service clear. The answer is D.
